LanguageData.snakANDapple.label: Snake and Apple
LanguageData.snakANDapple.letterText:
Two hungry lost men have come to your colony. The story is not over yet, keep fighting!
<color=#ff0000>Vic and XvA will join your colony, influenced by the background of their story, and now Star Explorer and XEO become enemies with your colony.</color>
LanguageData.XFbiodollAppeared.label: Strange Ancient
LanguageData.XFbiodollAppeared.letterText:
A Strange Ancient appeared, and she will stay here for a year. You can place some food outside to prevent her from leaving early due to lack of something to eat.

It should be noted that this event will only trigger once.

If it is found that her singing affects higher-dimensional beings, you can turn off her voice in the MOD settings.
